name: Lisa
comment:
# Lisa

    A simple lisp
    Example:
    ```
    (defunc fib (n)
        (var a 0) (var b 1) (var f 1)
        (defunc calc-fib (i)
            (if (<= i n)
                (do
                    (set f (+ a b))
                    (set a b)
                    (set b f)
                    (calc-fib (+ i 1)))
                f))
        (calc-fib 2))
    (= (fib 10) 55)
    ```

    @docs parseProgram
    @docs parseProgramToJson
    @docs parseExpression
    @docs parseExpressionToJson
